title: MOLTEN
MINIMALIST.
hero.intro: The aesthetic is the tension between organic molten forms and rigid structural grids.

cta.title: READY WHEN IT NEEDS TO SHIP.

sections.title: RED. BLACK. WHITE.
sections.body: Red as a signal, not a statement. Black as depth. White as clarity. Everything earns its place or it doesn't go in.

sections.title: BOLD. CONDENSED. TIGHT.
sections.body: Bold typography with tight tracking. All-caps hierarchy where it counts. Nothing decorative. Every letter does work.

sections.title: GEOMETRIC PRECISION.
sections.body: 12-column structure. Asymmetric breaks. Strong dividers. The grid is a tool, not a prison.

sections.title: MOLTEN VS RIGID.
sections.body: We hold two things at once: the organic, probabilistic nature of intelligence and the structural, deterministic requirements of systems that work. This tension is the aesthetic.
